scripts.test: node --test test/detection.test.js test/sam2.test.js test/server_api.test.js && python3 -m unittest discover -s test -p 'test_*.py'
scripts.benchmark:cellpose: CELLSAM_PYTHON=.venv-cellpose/bin/python CELLSAM_GPU_LIB_MODE=torch sh server/run_gpu_python.sh scripts/benchmark_models.py --images assets/validation --points-per-side 4 --models cellpose-cpsam-v2
